title: September 10
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|September|hide31=yes}}

'''September 10''' is the 253rd day of the year (254th in leap years). There are 112 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1960s#1963|1963]] – [[Jay Laga'aia]] is born.
*[[1979]] – ''[[Tatooine Sojourn]]'' serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*[[1994]] – [[Keira Wingate]] is born.
*[[2003]] – [[Empire 11|''Empire'' 11]] published.
*[[2008]] – [[The Clone Wars 1|''The Clone Wars'' 1]] published.
*[[2009]] – ''[[Death Troopers: Recovered Messages from Purge]]'' is released online through various fansites.
*[[2013]] – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Knights of the Old Republic Volume 1]]'' published.
*[[2017]] – [[Len Wein]] dies.
*[[2019]] – [[Star Wars Insider 192|''Star Wars Insider'' 192]] published.
*[[2022]] – [[Eric Jones]] dies.
*[[2024]] – ''[[Queen's Series: Padmé Paperback Box Set]]'' published.
*2024 – ''[[Star Wars: Darth Vader Vol. 9 – Rise of the Schism Imperial]]'' published.
*2024 – ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Rebellion Vol. 6]]'' published.
*[[2025]] – [[Jedi Knights 7|''Jedi Knights'' 7]] published.
*2025 – [[Tales From the Nightlands 1|''Tales From the Nightlands'' 1]] published.
